ddt:Target.Name: VSP2_v1.0
ddt:Target.Description:
******************** HISTORY ******************** Version DD/MM/YYYY: Change description
v0.1 19/07/2019 : Initial Version
v0.2 26/09/2019 : DIDs 0x101, 0x301, 0x302, 0x303, 0x304, 0x305 are modified DIDs 0x306, 0x307 and 0x308 are added Vehicle project xCB and xHN are added
v0.3 10/10/2019 DTCDeviceIdentifier updated with list of DTCs OutputControlCommand Start Byte changed to 4 in VSP Speaker request ($900A) Auto-ident added 04 U2F 0006 0003
V0.5 20/08/2020 update configuration parametes with new specification Auto-ident added V0.6 21/10/2020 add I/O FLAT REQUEST
Auto-ident correction issue V1.0 26/07/2021 DID $F195 (Version) switch from 19 to 21 bytes

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test not complete since last clear

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test failes since last clear

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: Status mask
Data.Comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear

Data.Name: VIN.CRC
Data.Comment: key code confirming the validity of the VIN, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: RenaultID.DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Comment: Fixed value (identifies a break in the ECU diag definition)

Data.Name: RenaultID.HardwareNumberLowerPart
Data.Comment: Identifies the hardware version of the ECU

Data.Name: RenaultID.SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Identifies the software version active in the ECU

Data.Name: RenaultID.EditionNumber
Data.Comment: Identifies the software version (edition) active in the ECU

Data.Name: VIN.VIN
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: NissanID.DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Comment: Fixed value (identifies a break in the ECU diag definition)

Data.Name: NissanID.EditionNumber
Data.Comment: Identifies the software version (edition) active in the ECU

Data.Name: NissanID.HardwareNumberLowerPart
Data.Comment: Identifies the hardware version of the ECU

Data.Name: NissanID.SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Identifies the software version active in the ECU

Data.Name: Multiplex network diagnostic request.Mute Module_Current_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.Mute Module_Confirmed_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.Mute Module_Fault counter
Multiplex network diagnostic request.METER Absent_Confirmed_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.METER Absent_Current_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.METER Absent_Fault counter
Multiplex network diagnostic request.BCM Absent_Confirmed_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.BCM Absent_Current_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.BCM Absent_Fault counter
Multiplex network diagnostic request.VCM Absent_Confirmed_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.VCM Absent_Current_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.VCM Absent_Fault counter

Item.Text: Control stopped by ControlOption parameter set to "Stop Control" (11)
Control stopped by ControlOption parameter set to "Stop Control" (11)

Data.Name: Multiplex network diagnostic request.AT Absent_HEV_Confirmed_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.AT Absent_HEV_Current_fault status
Multiplex network diagnostic request.AT Absent_HEV_Fault counter
vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: ConfigurationDataReferenceAfterConfigurationProcess
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM (Nissan)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber_N
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM (Nissan)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: ProgrammingOperationFingerPrint
Data.Description:
The value is written by the ECU when executing the SendKey SecurityAccess service

The value can be read in boot loader mode.

Data.Name: VSP Configuration Parameters1.DR_REV_IDENT_SOUND_CF
Data.Comment: Identical sound on Drive and Reverse status

Item.Text: Disable (Drive and Reverse mode emit different sounds)
Enable (Drive and Reverse mode emit the same sound)
Disable (Mute function with switch is not available)
Enable (Mute function with switch is available)

Data.Name: VSP Configuration Parameters1.DEFAULT_SOUND_CF
Data.Comment: Default sound on Drive and Reverse

Data.Name: SOUND_DELAY_CF.ICONIC_SOUND_DELAY_CF
Data.Comment: delay between the reception of request and emission of sound (to synchronize with flashing lights)

Data.Name: SOUND_DELAY_CF.CAR_FINDER_SOUND_DELAY_CF
Data.Comment: delay between the reception of request and emission of sound (to synchronize with flashing lights)

Item.Text: counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures masked
counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures not masked
Play Admit to charge battery sound request
Play Unlock charging plug sound request

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: VSP Configuration Parameters1.VSP_FEATURE_LOGIC_CF (RENAULT LOGIC, NISSAN LOGIC)
vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ECUReset.keyoffon
Request.Comment: Key OFF / Key ON Reset of ECU

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Extended
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportNumberOfDTCByStatusMask
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

DataItem.Name: VSP Configuration Parameters1.VSP_FEATURE_LOGIC_CF (RENAULT LOGIC, NISSAN LOGIC)
VSP Configuration Parameters1.VSP_FEATURE_LOGIC_CF (RENAULT LOGIC, NISSAN LOGIC)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Device.Name: POWER_AMPLIFIER
Device.Mnemonic: Short circuit to Vbatt OR short circuit to gnd OR overload detected when amplifier is on

Label.Text: - force configuration to be taken into account
- reset configuration parameters to default values
- except for phone acoustic parameters, acoustic paremeters, radio reception, ...
Key off / key on reset is used to :
- force configuration to be taken into account

Button.Text: Read Mileage of the last occurrence counter

Input.DataName: VSP Configuration Parameters1.VSP_FEATURE_LOGIC_CF (RENAULT LOGIC, NISSAN LOGIC)

Display.DataName: VSP Configuration Parameters1.VSP_FEATURE_LOGIC_CF (RENAULT LOGIC, NISSAN LOGIC)
